case_title: MAGSALIN, MARINA et al vs. VEGA, JORGE LUIS et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF APR-04-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-04-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-04-1996 TO MAY-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1996, CONTINUED TO SEP-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PER ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE FOR AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION & REQUEST TO WAIVE $50.00 SANCTIONS - GRANTED - 4 - JUDGE WICK. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAGSALIN, MARINA MAGSALIN, KARLE A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAGSALIN, MARINA MAGSALIN, KARLE A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, JORGE LUIS VEGA, ANGEL DOES 1 TO 20 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-08-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-29-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUBMITTED AN UNINSURED MOTORIST DECLARATION. APPEARANCE IS MANDATORY FOR ATTORNEY OF RECORD. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
